products.name: Everdrop 19L
products.description: Premium 19L dispenser bottle for homes and offices. Fast, reliable delivery across Islamabad and Rawalpindi.
products.whatsappMessage: Hi Everdrop, I'd like to order a 19L water bottle for delivery. My address/area is:

faqs.question: How much does 19L water cost in Islamabad?
faqs.answer: Everdrop 19L dispenser bottles are PKR 650 each with doorstep delivery included for most Islamabad and Rawalpindi areas.

faqs.question: Are Everdrop 19L bottles dispenser compatible?
faqs.answer: Yes. Everdrop 19L bottles use the standard neck size compatible with most home and office water dispensers.

faqs.question: Can I schedule weekly 19L office delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes. Many offices set up weekly or bi-weekly 19L delivery. Message us on WhatsApp with your address and preferred schedule.

faqs.question: How fast is 19L delivery in Islamabad?
faqs.answer: Most 19L orders in Islamabad and Rawalpindi are delivered within 24 hours. Same-day delivery may be available for select sectors.

products.name: Manual Pump Dispenser
products.description: Manual water dispenser pump for 19L bottles — simple, reliable, and ideal for homes without a full dispenser setup.
products.whatsappMessage: Hi Everdrop, I'd like to order a manual pump dispenser for 19L bottles. My delivery area is:

faqs.question: Is the manual pump compatible with Everdrop 19L bottles?
faqs.answer: Yes. The manual pump fits standard 19L neck bottles including Everdrop dispenser bottles.

products.name: Gravity Water Dispenser
products.description: Standard water dispenser for 19L bottles — uses gravity to dispense water, no electricity required.
products.whatsappMessage: Hi Everdrop, I'd like to enquire about a gravity water dispenser for 19L bottles. My delivery area is:

faqs.question: Does the gravity dispenser work with standard 19L bottles?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our gravity water dispensers are designed for standard 19L neck bottles including Everdrop.

faqs.question: Does this dispenser need electricity?
faqs.answer: No. It uses gravity to dispense water — simply place the bottle on top and pour from the tap.

products.name: Bottle Stand & Accessories
products.description: 19L bottle stand and supporting accessories — keeps your dispenser setup stable and tidy.

faqs.question: What is included with the bottle stand?
faqs.answer: The bottle stand supports standard 19L bottles and can be paired with manual pumps or dispensers. Message us on WhatsApp for current availability.

products.name: Home & Office Setup
products.description: Complete home and office water dispenser setup with 19L bottle accessories — everything you need in one place.

faqs.answer: Yes. We offer complete dispenser setups for homes and offices. Message us on WhatsApp with your needs and we confirm options and pricing.
